rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax for all AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons.
Omit unsafe clauses when AADL data representation does not support numeric scalar interpretation.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments and bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens (ms, Hz) as AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without valid variable or output representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints not tied to typed ports or constants
Model fusion and component insertion locations
